lessons.title: Consume an Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL change feed using the SDK
lessons.content_md:
Process change feed events using the change feed processor in the Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL .NET SDK.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/consume-azure-cosmos-db-sql-api-change-feed-use-sdk/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Consume an Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL change feed using the SDK

lessons.title: Handle events with Azure Functions and Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL change feed
lessons.content_md:
Use Azure Functions bindings to integrate a function with Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/handle-events-azure-functions-azure-cosmos-db-sql-api-change-feed/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Handle events with Azure Functions and Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL change feed

lessons.title: Search Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL data with Azure Cognitive Search

Index Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL data with Azure Cognitive Search.

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Integrate Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL with Azure services
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Integrate Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL with Azure services**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
